gmd:organisationName.gco:CharacterString: Aeronautical Information Service Center of Air Traffic Management Bureau, Civil Aviation Administration of China

gmd:deliveryPoint.gco:CharacterString: No.9 Xiedao West Road, Chaoyang District Beijing 100018, People's Republic of China

gmd:abstract.gco:CharacterString: The aeronautical data for People's Republic of China are collected and published according to ICAO Annex 15, 16th Edition requirements. Refer to the DPS document for detail information.

gmd:organisationName.gco:CharacterString: Aeronautical Information Service Center of Air Traffic Management Bureau, Civil Aviation Administration of China

gmd:deliveryPoint.gco:CharacterString: No.9 Xiedao West Road, Chaoyang District Beijing 100018, People's Republic of China

gmd:useLimitation.gco:CharacterString: For evaluation and testing use only; not for operational purposes.

aixm:LinguisticNote.aixm:note: Visual separation is implemented for ATS routes at 6 000m and below.(including ZYTLAR06)
不包括广州进近02、03号管制扇区 Exclude ZGGGAP02/03

不包括西宁进近02、04号管制扇区 Exclude ZLXNAP02 and ZLXNAP04
6000 米(含)以下空域内航路（含航线及侧向偏置）实施目视间隔运行。 Visual separation is implemented for ATS routes (inclusive lateral offset) at 6 000m and below.

The relevant rules, see subsectionENR 2.2.2. With ATC clearance, visual separation is implemented.
珠海终端管制区实施雷达管制，未安装二次雷达应答机的航空器禁止进入。 Radar control service is provided within Zhuhai Terminal Control Area, and aircraft operating without SSR transponder are prohibited.

经ATC许可，3600米（含）以下实施目视间隔运行。 With ATC clearance, visual separation is implemented at 3600m and below.

在广州飞行情报区内设立香港空中交通管制服务代理区,标准大气压高度3900米(含)以下,范围如下: Hong Kong AOR is established within Guangzhou FIR, Altitude limit 3900m or below, the coverage as follows: N222130 E1135200-N220934 E1134153-N221344 E1133957-N222434 E1134944-N222629 E1135444-N222405 E1135200-N222130 E1135200.
